title: Amazing
overview: On her first day of high school, Tanaka realizes that she's made a grave mistake - because she slept through the entrance exam. Oops.

title: Manga
overview: Because Baka is just too ridiculous, Wota asks Robo to read her manga - but on second thought, the literal-minded Robo might not have been a good choice, either.

title: Forgotten Item
overview: Loli is NOT LITTLE, dammit. And she can handle a solo trip to the grocery store just fine - so long as she can avoid that jerk-face Baka, that is.

title: Majime
overview: Majime desperately wants to get to know Robo. Does Baka hold the key to striking up an interesting conversation?

title: Lily
overview: A new transfer student arrives. She's beautiful. She's half Austrian. She loves girls. She's... allergic to Baka? What??!

title: Majo
overview: Majo is a bit socially awkward, but she means well. You just have to get past her friendship bracelets made of body parts and games that predict how you’ll die, that’s all!

title: Yamai
overview: Yamai sure does wear a lot of bandages... but such is the curse of the half-blood scion of the Atlantia and Dragonia races!

title: Buying Swimwear
overview: It’s summertime, and that mean it’s time for spoOoOoOoky stories! But is the real horror Baka’s terrifying tale, or what lies in wait for them at school after hours…?

title: Fashion
overview: After getting disrespected by some brats on the street, Loli decides it’s time to update her look. The results are… well, they’re something. Let’s leave it at that.

title: Robo
overview: It's time for the first years to choose either the Humanities or the Science Course. You wouldn't think this could cause a fight between Baka and Wota, but you'd be wrong.

title: Dream
overview: They say you should never meet your idols. They might end up being your homeroom teacher in disguise. Whomp whomp.

title: Friends
overview: Baka's grades are REALLY BAD. She might not get to advance a grade if she fails a single test. Is studying even worth it? Eh, probably not. Time to run away to a pig farm…
